title: PLAXSOON Flower Bouquet Building Set, 888 PCS Rose Botanical Collection Building Block for Home Decor, Flower Building Kit Valentine's Day Mother's Day Birthday Gift for Adults Women Boys Girls 8+
features: Vivid Flower Bouquet - PLAXSOON Flower Bouquet Building Set features 13 colorful flower stems with 8 different varieties, including peony, rose, hydrangea, platycodon grandiflorum flower, snowball, narcissus, snapdragon and consolida ajacis. Each flower in the building set is intricately detailed, with vivid colors and elegant designs, that will add sparkle and vitality to your home(Please note: vases are NOT included)

Endless Diy Fun - The angles of the petals and leaves of the flower are adjustable, whether they are in full bloom or tight buds ready to unfurl, each one exudes captivating beauty. The flower stems come in a variety of lengths that you can adjust the length of each flower to your liking to create your own unique flower building kit. Unleash your creativity and DIY the flower arrangement that you've always dreamed of

Excellent Decorative Ornament - This flower botanical collection kit consists of 13 flowers adorned with green leaf accent, creating a visually appealing arrangement suitable for offices, homes and any space. With no maintenance required, this everlasting bouquet will never fade, providing a warm, vibrant touch to your living space all year round

Premium Quality Brick - This creative bouquet building set consists of 888 pieces made from safe, non-toxic ABS materials. The surface of the building bricks are smooth and burr-free, safe and durable, providing an enjoyable building experience for builders. In the meantime, the flower building blocks are packaged by subcontracting, which is convenient for adults, women, teens, kids,boys and girls 8+ to find corresponding bricks to build in order

Perfect Gift Choice - Presented in a beautifully designed box with clear instructions, this flower plant building set is a great gift for loved ones. You can express your love for families, mothers, lovers, girlfriends with this thoughtful creation. This never-fade floral building set symbolizes enduring beauty, that is a meaningful present for flower lovers on birthday, Christmas, New Year’s, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Children's Day or any anniversary etc.
